questions.question: How do you overlap the avatar with the cover photo?
questions.explanation: A combination of negative margin, absolute positioning, or translateY can overlap avatar with cover.

questions.question: How do you create gradient story rings?
options: Padding + background gradient on parent, border on image
questions.explanation: A parent with padding and gradient background with an inner image having a white border creates the story ring effect.

questions.question: Which ARIA pattern is used for profile tabs?
questions.explanation: The tab pattern uses role='tablist' (container), role='tab' (tab buttons), and role='tabpanel' (content).

questions.question: What attribute indicates the active tab?
questions.explanation: aria-selected='true' indicates which tab is currently selected in a tablist.

questions.question: How do you make stories horizontally scrollable?
questions.explanation: Flexbox with overflow-x: auto creates a horizontal scrollable story bar.

questions.question: What is the purpose of profile stats?
questions.explanation: Profile stats display important social metrics like posts, followers, and following.

questions.question: How do you style the follow button?
options: Primary brand color with white text
questions.explanation: The follow button uses the platform's primary brand color with white text for emphasis.

questions.question: What layout is best for post cards in a feed?
questions.explanation: A single column layout with consistent card spacing provides the best feed reading experience.

questions.question: How do social media post actions typically display?
questions.explanation: Post actions (Like, Comment, Share) display as a flexbox row with icons and labels.

questions.question: What CSS property creates the avatar border?
questions.explanation: A CSS border on the avatar creates the ring effect separating it from the cover or background.

questions.question: How do you create the verified badge on profile pages?
options: Absolutely positioned icon with brand color and border-radius
questions.explanation: A small positioned icon with brand blue color and border-radius creates the verified checkmark badge.

questions.question: What CSS creates the bio text with link highlighting?
options: Paragraph with styled anchor tags using a specific link color
questions.explanation: A paragraph element with styled anchor tags using the brand accent color creates clickable bio links.

questions.question: How do you create a photo grid layout (3-column) for profile galleries?
options: CSS Grid with repeat(3, 1fr) and fixed aspect-ratio
questions.explanation: CSS Grid with equal 1fr columns and aspect-ratio creates a clean photo grid for profile galleries.

questions.question: What approach creates the 'suggested friends' section?
options: Horizontal flexbox row of avatar + name + follow button cards
questions.explanation: A horizontal scrollable or wrapping flexbox row of small cards with avatar, name, and follow button.

questions.question: How do you create a notification bell icon with badge?
options: Relative container with icon and absolute positioned count badge
questions.explanation: A relative-positioned icon container with an absolutely positioned count span creates the notification badge.

questions.question: What CSS creates the message button style?
options: Outline button with brand color border and transparent background
questions.explanation: An outline button with brand-colored border and transparent background is standard for secondary actions.

questions.question: How do you create the edit profile button?
options: Outline button with subtle border and hover fill effect
questions.explanation: An outline button that transitions to filled on hover is the standard edit profile pattern.

questions.question: What approach creates a dropdown menu for post options?
options: Absolute positioned menu triggered by a toggle button/click
questions.explanation: An absolutely positioned dropdown panel toggled by a three-dot or gear button is standard.

questions.question: How do you create highlight covers (story highlights) below bio?
options: Horizontal flexbox row with circular cover images and labels
questions.explanation: A horizontal flexbox row of circular cover image thumbnails with text labels creates story highlights.

questions.question: What CSS creates the skeleton loading effect while profile loads?
options: @keyframes shimmer animation on gradient background of placeholder elements
questions.explanation: A CSS keyframe animation that moves a gradient across placeholder elements creates the skeleton shimmer effect.
